patch.value: Search relevance evaluation harness (golden queries, nDCG) for regression detection
No automated way to verify a ranking change improves/regresses quality. A golden-query fixture set scored via nDCG@5 gives a tuning feedback loop and catches regressions.

tests/search-eval/ JSON fixtures {query,mode,expected_top_ids}; pm test --eval-search (or pm reindex --eval) scores nDCG@5 with per-fixture pass/fail; optional non-blocking CI gate; seeded with 10-20 real corpus queries.
No automated way to verify a ranking change improves/regresses quality. A golden-query fixture set scored via nDCG@5 gives a tuning feedback loop and catches regressions.
